title: SCHLEICH Horse Club - 26 PC Tori and Princess Horse Toy Stall Playset with Dog Figurine and Accessories - Realistic, Posable Rider Figure and Pony Toys for Girls and Boys - Kids Ages 5+ - 42437
features: 26-PIECE SET, YOUR HORSE CLUB ADVENTURE STARTS HERE - Saddle up with Tori & Princess! Decorate the stall, gear up with stickers, and create endless equestrian adventures with this horse and rider set

DESIGNED WITH TRUE-TO-LIFE DETAIL - For realistic rides and endless fun, this mare horse toy, posable action figure, detailed riding gear, and stable set create immersive equestrian adventures through imaginative play

A DREAM GIFT FOR HORSE LOVERS OF ALL AGES. Kickstart your son or daughter's animal collection! Used as party decorations or gifts, our high-quality, equestrian toys will light up the face of the birthday girl or boy from 5 years old +

WELCOME TO HORSE CLUB. In this world of friendship and adventure, horses and characters' stories come alive. From foals frolicking on the farm, to stallions racing on the ranch, and the big horse show - it's a horse girl's paradise.

IMAGINATION WITHOUT LIMITS - Schleich toys come in all shapes and sizes to bring stories to life. We value sustainability which is why we created worlds of durable toys that can be treasured for generations to come
description: From the manufacturer schleich HORSE CLUB — Horse Box with Tori & Princess Get Tori, Princess and Beauty photo-finish ready with this wonderful stable play set! Princess is teaching Tori about more than just riding. Together they take home trophies and rosettes, but they also learn all about connecting with each other and the importance of being gentle and kind. Create limitless stories about dressage, show jumping and more, with Tori and her loyal pets.
